summary: Cooperative task scheduler/FSM: linked-list state machine per Object. Push/pop substate stack, delay counters, callback dispatch. Implements task.h API. Used by player, model, match, camera, scroll, hud, item, fighters, practice.

functions.name: x_bbe35044
functions.summary: Free all task nodes in a linked list back to the pool allocator. Iterates through the list and calls pool free (x_48825d30) on each node.
params: list - head of task linked list

functions.name: x_c0a431f7
functions.summary: Core task scheduler dispatcher for an Object. Iterates the object's task list, handles push/pop substate stack, delay counters, and executes runnable callbacks. If global lock (x_66c4e9c7) is set, returns immediately. Push conditions: time-based (x_09809fad), frame-based (x_c6236507), or forced push (x_04b7a0c6 + x_2612575e). Pop flag (x_d8bfe182) restores previous state from stack. Runnable flag (x_0fb55613) triggers callback execution.
params: obj - Object whose task list to process

functions.name: x_52c4e4a9
functions.summary: Linear search for a task by ID in a linked list. Returns pointer to task if found, otherwise falls through (no explicit NULL return).
functions.returns: x_41a0e1e6* - matching task or undefined if not found

functions.name: x_20a23ba4
functions.summary: Allocate and append a new task to an Object's task list. Pulls from pool allocator (x_6d619dce), appends to end of list, assigns auto-incrementing ID, initializes stack pointer, callback, flags, delay.

functions.name: x_0ae6735d
functions.summary: Mark the currently executing task for pop/removal. Sets the pop flag (x_d8bfe182) on the current task via x_5e6f40dd macro. Called from task callbacks to signal completion/transition.
params: obj - parent Object (current task in obj->x_64946db0)

open_questions: x_52c4e4a9 missing explicit NULL return on not-found — is this intentional?
